vision.studyPrompt: Study the position, then hide it and calculate the line below.
vision.showsFinal: The board now shows the final position.
vision.footer: Calculating without moving the pieces is the engine of tactics and endgames. Start short, build up.

blindfold.findPrompt: Find the winning move — click the piece, then its destination.
blindfold.notMove: Not the move. Try again, peek, or reveal.
blindfold.footer: Holding the position in your mind’s eye and finding a move blind is the ultimate board-vision test.

mates.title: Checkmate patterns
mates.blurb: Learn the classic mating nets, then drill them to recall.
mates.wrong: Not the mating move. Try again, or reveal.
mates.noDue: No mate drills due right now — learn a new pattern!

blunders.title: Anti-blunder
blunders.blurb: Find the strong move — but watch for the tempting one. Before you commit, the trainer asks: are you sure?

intro.white: White to move — find the safe, strong move.
intro.black: Black to move — find the safe, strong move.

blunders.dodged: That dodges the trap. The model move was {{san}}. {{explanation}}
blunders.savedYou: Good — a blunder-check just saved you. Now find a safe move.
blunders.noDue: No blunder drills due right now — try a new one!

blurbs.find: Click the named square as fast as you can.
blurbs.name: Name the highlighted square.
blurbs.color: Is the highlighted square light or dark?
blurbs.knight: Click every square the knight can jump to.

coordinates.colorPrompt: Is the ringed square light or dark?

endgame.title: Endgame studies

status.drawnSlipped: ½ Drawn — the win slipped away.
status.mated: You got mated! Restart and try again.

endgame.syzygyLoaded: ♟ Syzygy {{n}}-man tablebases loaded — the defender is perfect.

endgameDrills.title: Endgame drills
endgameDrills.blurb: Essential technique vs perfect defence — every move checked against the tablebase.
endgameDrills.introWin: You are {{color}} — convert the win against perfect defence.
endgameDrills.introDraw: You are {{color}} — hold the draw against perfect play.
endgameDrills.offlineBook: Offline — can’t verify that against the tablebase. The book line plays {{san}} here. Take-back — try again.
endgameDrills.noHint: No hint available here — trust the technique.
endgameDrills.noDue: No endgame drills due right now — pick any technique to learn!

status.slippedWin: The win slipped away — restart and try again.
status.slippedDraw: The draw slipped away — restart and try again.
status.offline: Your move — offline, judged against the book line.
